package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefix() string {
    ruleID := "strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`if strings.HasPrefix(s, p) { s = strings.TrimPrefix(s, p) }`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
